subject: Thundurus in Incarnate Forme, a genie-like electric creature
description: A muscular genie-like creature with a dark blue upper body and white cloud-like lower form hovers dynamically against a blazing field of yellow and white lightning. The figure has horns, a spiked tail, and outstretched arms as electrical arcs discharge outward in every direction. The entire composition is dominated by crackling energy, with the background saturated in bright yellow and white bolt-shapes suggesting a storm in full chaos. The holofoil treatment amplifies the electric atmosphere with prismatic shimmer across the card.
foreground: Thundurus floating and discharging lightning, arms outstretched
background: blazing field of lightning bolts, white and yellow energy
